name: Podroid
description: Rootless Podman for Android — run Linux containers on your phone
readme_summary: Podroid enables users to run Linux containers on their Android devices without root access. It achieves this by setting up a lightweight QEMU virtual machine that hosts a Podman container runtime, providing a full terminal experience with extensive customization options for themes, fonts, and key mappings.
key_features: Rootless Podman container runtime on Android
Lightweight QEMU VM with Alpine Linux
Full VT100/xterm terminal with real PTY
Extensive customization for themes, fonts, and extra keys
Persistent storage and Android Downloads sharing
Port forwarding and runtime network control
primary_use_case: Running Linux containers and command-line tools on an Android phone without requiring root privileges.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized Android phone depicted as a miniature, vibrant city. From the phone's screen, a holographic portal opens, through which a diverse array of Linux containers (represented by small, distinct architectural structures like servers, workshops, and data centers) are being seamlessly deployed and managed by a friendly, floating AI assistant. The containers are connected by glowing data streams, symbolizing networking and communication. Subtle UI elements resembling Podman commands are visible on a small, transparent screen attached to the phone. The overall style is a clean, futuristic 3D isometric illustration with a bright, optimistic color palette, emphasizing accessibility and power.

name: ai-subtitles
description: Generate subtitles for any videos with AI
readme_summary: SubStudio is a web application built with Next.js that generates subtitles for videos using AI. It leverages Together AI's Whisper model for accurate transcription and allows users to edit, style, and export subtitles in various formats.
key_features: Supports video uploads and direct media links
Uses Together AI's Whisper Large v3 for transcription
Real-time subtitle preview and styling with 6 preset styles
Export subtitles in .srt, .vtt, or burned-in .mp4 formats
primary_use_case: Automatically generating and styling subtitles for video content.
cover_image_prompt: A magical, glowing quill pen hovering over a video playback screen. As the video plays, the quill automatically writes perfectly timed subtitles onto the screen in elegant, readable text. The input video is represented by a film reel feeding into the screen, and the output subtitles are shown as streams of digital light flowing from the quill. Subtle UI elements of the SubStudio application are visible on the screen's edges, displaying styling options. The scene is set in a modern, minimalist studio with soft, ambient lighting, emphasizing clarity and ease of use. The overall style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, vibrant color palette, conveying innovation and effortless content creation.

name: File_Converter_Pro
description: Free offline all-in-one file converter for Windows. Converts documents, images, audio and video locally. No uploads, no internet, no dependencies. Built with Python & PySide6. Features dark/light theme, stats dashboard, achievements, and multi-engine fallback.
readme_summary: File Converter Pro is a free, offline, all-in-one file conversion desktop application for Windows. It supports documents, images, audio, and video, offering a polished user interface with features like dark/light themes and a statistics dashboard, all built with Python and PySide6.
key_features: Polished UI with Dark/Light mode and animations
Statistics Dashboard with Matplotlib charts and export options
primary_use_case: To provide Windows users with a free, offline, and feature-rich desktop application for converting various file types without requiring an internet connection or uploading files.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, anthropomorphic digital Swiss Army knife with multiple interchangeable tool heads (representing different file types like documents, images, audio, video) actively transforming a jumbled pile of various file icons into a neat, organized stack of universally recognized file symbols. The scene is set on a clean, modern desk with subtle glowing circuit patterns on the surface. Small, unobtrusive UI elements showing conversion progress and statistics are visible on a floating digital panel. The overall mood is efficient and user-friendly, with a clean, bright aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant colors and clear, distinct shapes.

name: dashy
description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!
readme_summary: Dashy is a self-hostable personal dashboard designed to organize and provide quick access to all your self-hosted services and applications. It offers features like status monitoring, customizable widgets, theming, and a user-friendly UI editor, making it an ideal central hub for managing your homelab or personal projects.
key_features: Multiple color themes and UI editor
Easy setup with Docker or bare metal
primary_use_case: To serve as a centralized, customizable, and self-hosted dashboard for managing and accessing personal services, applications, and links.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, organized control room where a single, intuitive dashboard interface is the central focus. Imagine a holographic display showing various connected 'services' as glowing nodes, each with a status indicator (green for healthy, red for issues). Small, stylized icons represent different applications like media servers, smart home controls, and development tools. A friendly, stylized robot arm is shown interacting with the dashboard, perhaps adjusting a widget or checking a status. Subtle digital particles and data streams flow between the nodes, symbolizing connectivity and information flow. The overall mood is one of efficient organization and control, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The 'Dashy' logo is subtly integrated into the main display. Style: 3D isometric illustration, clean lines, bright and inviting color palette.

name: sealed-secrets
description: A Kubernetes controller and tool for one-way encrypted Secrets
readme_summary: Sealed Secrets is a Kubernetes controller and tool that allows for the one-way encryption of sensitive data (Secrets) before they are stored in Git. It ensures that only the controller running within the target Kubernetes cluster can decrypt these secrets, making them safe for version control.
key_features: Controller for decryption within the cluster
Safe storage of secrets in Git repositories
Kubeseal CLI tool for encryption and management
Support for secret rotation and key management
primary_use_case: Securely managing Kubernetes Secrets in Git repositories as part of a GitOps workflow.
cover_image_prompt: A secure vault door, intricately designed with Kubernetes logos, stands slightly ajar. From within, a single, glowing key is visible, representing a Kubernetes Secret. A digital hand, made of code and data streams, is carefully placing a sealed, opaque box (representing a SealedSecret) into a Git repository visualized as an open book. The box has a small lock icon. The background is a clean, abstract representation of a cloud infrastructure. Subtle glowing lines connect the vault, the box, and the Git repository, symbolizing the secure transfer and storage. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a modern, clean aesthetic and a color palette of blues, greens, and subtle metallic accents, emphasizing security and digital workflow.

name: gutenberg
description: The Block Editor project for WordPress and beyond. Plugin is available from the official repository.
readme_summary: The Gutenberg project is the development hub for the block editor of WordPress, revolutionizing content creation with a modular, block-based approach. It enables users to visually arrange content elements like paragraphs and images, moving beyond traditional text editing to a more intuitive and flexible publishing experience.
key_features: Modular approach to pages and posts
Foundation for future WordPress phases (Customization, Collaboration, Multilingual)
primary_use_case: To provide a modern, block-based editor for WordPress that allows users to create rich and visually appealing content intuitively.
cover_image_prompt: A master craftsman in a vibrant workshop, assembling a beautiful, intricate structure piece by piece from various colorful, distinct blocks. Each block represents a content element like text, images, or media. The craftsman is shown placing a new block, which seamlessly integrates into the growing structure, illuminating the whole. Subtle UI elements resembling WordPress block controls float around the scene, and the repository name 'Gutenberg' is subtly etched onto a workbench. The overall mood is creative and productive, with warm, inviting lighting. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a focus on the modular assembly.
